text:
Part D). 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug System (MARx) data (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CMS and Medicare Advantage (MA) plans use the MARx System to exchange data files and reports 
between the Plans and CMS. The capitation payments provided to MA and Medicare Advantage 
Prescription Drug (MAPD) sponsors are calculated and paid monthly. 

CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all the monthly Part A and Part B capitated premium 
payments. The
